headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 9, 2026**
article:
The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Mike Burrows led the way with 7.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

Injuries and availability are impacting several teams. The San Francisco Giants placed Logan Webb on the 15-day injured list due to right knee bursitis. The Milwaukee Brewers placed Brandon Lockridge on the 10-day injured list with a right knee laceration and contusion. The Los Angeles Dodgers transferred Tommy Edman to the 60-day injured list for recovery from right ankle surgery.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The San Francisco Giants traded Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Philadelphia Phillies traded Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. The Athletics traded RHP Tyler Ferguson to the Chicago Cubs.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Reds 10-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros dominated the Cincinnati Reds, securing a 10-0 victory behind a strong performance from their pitching staff. Mike Burrows led the way with 7.0 innings pitched, 6 strikeouts, and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rally Past Phillies 9-7**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 9-7 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies, marking a comeback win for the Rockies. Hunter Goodman led the Rockies' offense with a 4-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Edge Orioles in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics secured a narrow win over the Baltimore Orioles, with Jacob Lopez earning the win and Hogan Harris securing the save.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Toronto**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels suffered a 0-2 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the team with 1 hit, 1 RBI, and 3 at-bats. Dylan Cease earned the win for the Blue Jays, pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Rout Angels 14-1 in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays handed the Los Angeles Angels a lopsided 14-1 defeat, with multiple impact hitters contributing to the win. Impact players for the Blue Jays included Yoán Moncada, Josh Lowe, George Springer, Vladimir Guerrero Jr., Jesús Sánchez, Daulton Varsho, Ernie Clement, and Brandon Valenzuela, while Trey Yesavage stood out on the mound.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out by Red Sox in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 0-0 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, marking a hard-fought win for the home team. The game ended with the Red Sox emerging as the winners, while the Rays fell short.

top_news.title: **Giants' Logan Webb Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants right-hander Logan Webb has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right knee bursitis, effective retroactive to May 6, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have bolstered their roster with the acquisition of left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. Wilkinson joins the Giants' organization as part of a trade deal.
